paper_title: Galactica: A Large Language Model for Science

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduced a highly curated scientific corpus (~106B tokens) and novel modality-specific tokens ([START_REF], <work>, [START_SMILES], etc.) to enable deep scientific knowledge representation, reasoning, and multi-modal integration—outperforming general-purpose LLMs on specialized tasks like LaTeX equations, math problems, and PubMedQA
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Curated scientific corpus (48M papers, textbooks, lecture notes, 2M code snippets, reference materials, knowledge bases, filtered Common Crawl, prompts, and multimodal data)
raw_extraction.application: Scientific literature review, equation generation, drug discovery, protein annotation, citation prediction, multi-modal reasoning, and domain-specific knowledge synthesis
raw_extraction.research_problem: Organizing, retrieving, and reasoning over vast scientific knowledge bases to address information overload in research
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling with specialized modality tokens
raw_extraction.paper_title: Galactica: A Large Language Model for Science

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **prompt pre-training** alongside general corpora, along with the novel `<work>` token for external working memory to handle complex computations offloaded to Python scripts. Uses learned positional embeddings, GeLU activations, and no biases in dense kernels
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Curated scientific corpora (includes GSM8k, OneSmallStep, Khan Problems, Workout, and transformed datasets)
raw_extraction.application: Scientific question answering, mathematical reasoning, domain-specific knowledge extraction, and compositional problem-solving
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing a specialized LLM for scientific reasoning and knowledge-intensive tasks through structured pre-training techniques
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling with prompt pre-training and external working memory (<work>) integration
raw_extraction.paper_title: Galactica: A Large Language Model for Science

raw_extraction.innovation: Same core innovations as Galactica 125M but scaled up with improved architecture (GeLU activations, learned positional embeddings, no biases). Demonstrates enhanced scientific reasoning capabilities with the `<work>` token for offloading computations
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Curated scientific corpora (includes GSM8k, OneSmallStep, Khan Problems, Workout, and transformed datasets)
raw_extraction.application: Advanced scientific QA, mathematical problem-solving, domain-specific knowledge retrieval, and multi-step reasoning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhanced scientific reasoning and knowledge-intensive task performance through larger model scale and structured pre-training
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling with prompt pre-training and external working memory (<work>) integration
raw_extraction.paper_title: Galactica: A Large Language Model for Science

raw_extraction.innovation: Further scaling with deeper architectures (more layers/heads) while maintaining the `<work>` token mechanism for computational offloading. Stronger performance in scientific reasoning tasks, particularly in math and domain-specific knowledge
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Curated scientific corpora (includes GSM8k, OneSmallStep, Khan Problems, Workout, and transformed datasets)
raw_extraction.application: High-stakes scientific problem-solving, specialized domain knowledge extraction, and complex multi-step reasoning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable scientific LLM development with advanced reasoning capabilities
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling with prompt pre-training and external working memory (<work>) integration
raw_extraction.paper_title: Galactica: A Large Language Model for Science

raw_extraction.innovation: State-of-the-art scientific LLM with the `<work>` token for handling computationally intensive steps. Demonstrates superior performance across scientific benchmarks (e.g., LaTeX equations, domain probes, MMLU math) compared to prior models like PaLM
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Curated scientific corpora (includes GSM8k, OneSmallStep, Khan Problems, Workout, and transformed datasets)
raw_extraction.application: Research-grade scientific question answering, advanced mathematics, and domain-specific knowledge synthesis
raw_extraction.research_problem: Maximizing scientific reasoning capabilities through large-scale pre-training and specialized task integration
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling with prompt pre-training and external working memory (<work>) integration
raw_extraction.paper_title: Galactica: A Large Language Model for Science

raw_extraction.innovation: Largest model in the series, optimized for scientific applications with the `<work>` token for robust computational support. Achieves near-minerva-level performance with 18x fewer parameters than PaLM-540B, highlighting efficiency in specialized domains
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Curated scientific corpora (includes GSM8k, OneSmallStep, Khan Problems, Workout, and transformed datasets)
raw_extraction.application: Cutting-edge scientific research, high-precision domain knowledge extraction, and complex reasoning tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Optimizing scientific LLM performance at extreme scale with minimal resource overhead
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling with prompt pre-training and external working memory (<work>) integration
raw_extraction.paper_title: Galactica: A Large Language Model for Science

raw_extraction.innovation: Fine-tuned for specialized scientific domains through extensive blending of raw text, structured references, and domain-specific knowledge bases. Unlike general-purpose LLMs, it leverages curated scientific corpora including mathematical content and citations to enhance factual accuracy in STEM domains
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Combination of 48 million scientific papers (arXiv, PMC, Semantic Scholar, PubMed Abstracts, reference materials, and biomedical knowledge bases totaling ~88B tokens)
raw_extraction.application: Scientific question answering, literature review synthesis, domain-specific reasoning, biomedical research support, chemical structure prediction, and knowledge extraction from scientific publications
raw_extraction.research_problem: Specialized scientific language understanding and generation
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Multimodal scientific text processing (combining abstracts, full texts, references, and structured data)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Galactica: A Large Language Model for Science
